name: crypto-sentiment-snapshot
description: Cross-rail crypto read: market sentiment via Arrays Fear & Greed (Circle nanopayment, DIRECT) + a coin price quote via CoinMarketCap (routed-x402 via the SELAT Router). One run exercises both payment rails.

symbol.description: Coin symbol for the CoinMarketCap quote, e.g. BTC, ETH

start_time.description: Fear & Greed window start as a Unix timestamp in seconds (UTC). For current sentiment use roughly now minus 2 days.

end_time.description: Fear & Greed window end as a Unix timestamp in seconds (UTC). Must be greater than start_time; use the current time for the latest reading.

steps.label: market sentiment — Arrays Fear & Greed (Circle nanopayment / Gateway-batched, DIRECT)
price quote — CoinMarketCap (erc-3009, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
